schema.name: edit_lines
schema.description: Replaces a 1-based inclusive line range in a file under the NDX virtual root. Use this for multi-line code edits when line numbers are known from read_file or grep_search.

file_path.description: Path relative to the project root, or a container absolute path under the NDX virtual root. Prefer relative project paths.

replacement.description: Replacement text for the selected line range. Use an empty string to delete the selected lines.

expected_text.description: Optional exact text currently expected in the selected line range. When provided, the edit fails if the range changed.
